title: Local authority capacity support funding
body: "The Department for Education (DfE) is providing local authorities with £12.9 million of additional funding in the 2026 to 2027 financial year to support their capacity to deliver a sufficient and sustainable school-age childcare system.  The guidance sets out DfE’s expectations on how local authorities should use this funding to support the delivery and sustainability of school-age childcare through:   supporting the national rollout of free breakfast clubs fostering links between holiday childcare and the holiday activities and food programme (HAF)   The local authority capacity support  funding is in addition to HAF administration funding.  "
